sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I Topa hong thawhkik ni, lungdam paisan pawipi;
Pasian paisan pawipi in, sihna pan hinna
Leitung aw, genkhia dih in, lei pan vantung dong ah;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Amanin i muh theih na’ng, i lungsim siangsak ni;
thawhkikna khuavak, hong tangsak khinta hi.
Ama thugen ngai le hang, teltakin i thei ding;
kiphatna awgingte, teltakin i za ding.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Vantungte lungdam hen la, leitung in lasa
Leitung le a sunga te’n, gualzawhna gen uh hen.
Muh theih muh mawh khempeuh in, aw
Jesuh thokik khinta a, kilungdam tawntung hi.
